_meta.name: NREL-118 generator inventory by technology
_meta.description: Counts of generators by fuel/technology family in the NREL-Sienna/PowerSystemsTestData 118-Bus master inventory. NOT a paper-table per se (the paper describes 10 technology classes generally), but the dataset breakdown that the paper's PCM model dispatches against. Useful as a sanity check for any future full-system converter run.
_meta.extraction_method: Grouped by Generator-Name prefix on the published Generators.csv (339 rows total)

secondary_inventory_gen_csv._note: The repo also ships gen.csv (the 397-row Sienna-flavoured rewrite of Generators.csv). The two are NOT 1:1 — gen.csv adds explicit type / PrimeMoveType columns and disaggregates certain Sienna entries.

subset_used_by_cpp_test._description: test_emission_nrel118_port.cpp picks one representative generator per IPCC-distinct fuel kind, NOT the full inventory above. The capacities are CHOSEN (not from Generators.csv) so the single-block LP is non-degenerate; the heat rates ARE the pmax-weighted segment averages computed by scripts/nrel118_to_gtopt/_converter.py:collapse_piecewise_heat_rate on the named rows.

generators.name: nuclear_baseload
generators.tag_in_nrel118: synthetic baseload (no NREL-118 nuclear row in the 339-row file)
